news_items.headline: Hermes Agent: The Self-Improving AI That Learns You
news_items.summary:
[Prompt Engineering · 10K views] Open Router gives you access to 100+ models through a single API endpoint. Try it free and find the best model for your workflow at https://openrouter.plug.dev/SoSUEGl

Hermes Agent is an open-source AI agent system with a self-improvement loop that automatically creates and refines skills based on your usage, builds a model of your preferences, and gets better the longer you use it. In this video, I walk you through the setup process using Open Router, show you a practical code review workflow,

news_items.headline: Anthropic Is Building a Super App
news_items.summary:
[Prompt Engineering · 6K views] Anthropic just redesigned Claude Desktop around Claude Code with parallel sessions, split panels, and a built-in browser preview, turning it into a unified dev environment that could replace your IDE and terminal. They also introduced Routines, scheduled tasks that run on Anthropic's cloud infrastructure so your agents keep working even when your computer is off.

news_items.headline: Build Android apps using any AI agent with Android CLI and skills
news_items.summary:
[Google DeepMind · 4K views] We’re making it easier for you to build high quality apps with any agent, LLM, and tool. Android CLI, Android skills, and Android knowledge base are designed to support agent-driven workflows. These resources aim to help your agents build apps more efficiently and effectively, saving you time and tokens. Learn how to use these tools to set up environments, create projects, and deploy apps.

Resources: 
Learn more → https://goo.gle/3D4hF3J 
Subscribe to Android Developers → https://goo.gle/Androi

news_items.headline: AI agent long-term memory with memory bank
news_items.summary:
[Google Cloud Tech · 3K views] Building Stateful and Personalized Agents with ADK codelab → http://goo.gle/agentmemorylab 

Build AI agents that remember,  across sessions, images, video, and audio. 
In this episode, you'll learn how to implement long-term, multimodal memory 
for AI agents using the Agent Development Kit (ADK) Memory Bank on Google Cloud.

Learn how to:
✅ Understand the difference between SessionService and MemoryService
✅ Explore MemoryService options in ADK
✅ Save and retrieve memories automatically across

news_items.headline: Can we fix this AI agent in 60 minutes? (Live builder Q&A)
news_items.summary:
[Google Cloud Tech · 3K views] Start building today. → https://goo.gle/4v2fVAs

Welcome to the premiere of The Agent Clinic! Have you ever "vibe-coded" an AI prototype that works perfectly on your laptop but breaks when you try to scale it? You're not alone. Jacob Badish submitted his outreach agent, "Project Titanium," to the clinic after hitting a wall with hardcoded bottlenecks and accuracy risks. Now, host and Lead Diagnostician Luis Sala is teaming up with Jacob to fix it live. Watch as they race against a 60 minute cloc

news_items.headline: Google Play PolicyBytes - April 2026 policy updates
news_items.summary:
[Google DeepMind · 2K views] Bohdan Kosenko, from Regional Operations North America, Trust and Safety, Google Play, shares important updates from our April 2026 Google Play policy announcements.

Chapters:
0:00 - Introduction
0:44 - Contacts permissions
1:38-  Account transfers
3:10 - Updates & clarifications
3:18 - Age-restricted content and functionality
3:51 - Locations permissions 
5:09 - Key dates
5:20 - Reminders
6:15 - Free policy course from Google 
6:30 - Policy Webinar
6:54 - Google Play Developer Help Community

news_items.headline: המשימה לירח: כל מה שצריך לדעת
news_items.summary:
[TrashTech · 2K views] השבוע בטראשטק: חוזרים לירח! אחרי יותר מ-50 שנה, משימת ארטמיס 2 של נאס״א נחתה בחזרה בשלום ושברה לא מעט שיאים. מנהל סוכנות החלל הישראלית רן לבנה מספר בראיון את כל הפרטים על המסע המטורף (למה כולם רצים לירח?) ואיך עושים צרכים בחלל?

האם אפשר לסמוך על סם אלטמן? כל הפרטים על התחקיר הענק שפורסם בניו יורקר וחושף פרטים על אחד האנשים המשפיעים בעולם הטכנולוגיה.

וגם - המודל שאנתרופיק לא מוכנה לשחרר לקהל הרחב: הכירו את ״Mythos Preview״ שמסוגל לפרוץ כמעט כל מערכת בעולם. ד״ר גיא וייזל (Cato Networks) הגיע לאו

news_items.headline: Build a Voice-Enabled Telegram Bot with the Gemini Interactions API
news_items.summary:
[Google for Developers · 2K views] Thor from Google DeepMind walks through how to build a Telegram bot that receives voice messages, reasons over them with Gemini 3.1 Flash, and responds with generated speech in a custom accent, all built with Antigravity and deployed to Cloud Run without writing the code manually.
What's covered: Setting up a Telegram bot with BotFather, using Gemini Flash for reasoning and Gemini TTS for voice responses, handling OGG audio from Telegram and converting output with FFmpeg, building agent, transcr
